content.en:
"It can't be intentional!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden smiled bitterly, knowing how idiotic she was with what she was thinking just now, how could she break the shackles in a few minutes and impact the combat power of the eight-star god general?

Even if Ye Tian sent people to the ancestral monument to watch from time to time and learned that she had been promoted to an eight-star god general a few minutes ago, there was no way to immediately choose to be promoted to an eight-star god general and deliberately suppress her!

It's simply not realistic!

It can only be said that it was too much of a coincidence, she and Ye Tian broke through almost at the same time, and Ye Tian had just broken through the eight-star god general and surpassed her, which proved that the ancestral monument thought that Ye Tian was stronger than her.

The judgment criteria of the ancestral monument are not completely correct, but to a certain extent, Ye Tian is more powerful than her, and his background is stronger than her.

"The strength improvement brought by the ice-free fire has been completely excavated, and it will take a long time for me to improve my strength again, unless there are amazing opportunities in the great universe, otherwise it will take tens of millions or even hundreds of millions of years for me to improve my strength to the middle of the eight-star period. The Cloud Purple Priestess muttered.

This is still her high talent, if she is replaced by other eight-star god generals, it is estimated that she will cultivate for hundreds of billions of years, and she will still be an eight-star early stage god general.

For example, the eight-star god generals in the top few on the god list are estimated to have no way to improve their strength, and they are probably preparing to be promoted to the realm of the Mandate of Heaven.

The Yunzi Divine Maiden was struggling with the ranking of the first place on the list of god generals, but Ye Tian didn't pay attention to the ranking of the first place on the list of god generals at all.

He was completely immersed in cultivation, after all, his strength was in a stage of rapid improvement.

The Dao patterns were engraved on the Void Heaven Dao Body by Ye Tian, and the Void Heaven Dao Body became stronger and stronger.

Another 10,000 years have passed, and the seventh Dao pattern, the Wood Dao Pattern, has been inscribed into the Void Heaven Dao Body, and its strength has risen again!

With the passage of time, the eighth Dao pattern, the Dao Pattern of Water, was inscribed into the Void Heaven Dao Body, the ninth Dao Pattern, the Dao Pattern of Earth, was inscribed into the Void Heaven Dao Body, the tenth Dao Pattern, the Dao Pattern of the Wind was inscribed into the Void Heaven Dao Body, and the eleventh Dao Pattern, the Dao Pattern of Light, was inscribed into the Void Heaven Dao Body.

Finally, Ye Tian inscribed the twelfth Dao pattern into the Void Heaven Dao Body.

Although it took Ye Tian 80,000 years for the eight Dao patterns to be inscribed into the Void Heaven Dao Body, the improvement in strength was too much.

With the blessing of the twelve Dao patterns, the Void Heaven Dao Body has definitely reached the realm of no one before or since.

At this time, Ye Tian felt that his strength was infinitely close to the mid-stage eight-star god general, but he still hadn't reached it.

"You can condense the prototypes of other avenues one by one!"

Ye Tian decided.

For example, the defensive avenue contained in Gu Yuan's imperial body divine power, he has not yet condensed.

As a result, Ye Tian began to condense the prototype of the Defensive Dao, and after 10,000 years, the prototype of the Defensive Avenue was successfully condensed.

Then, Ye Tian successfully engraved the defensive Dao pattern.

20,000 years later, the prototype of the Great Dao of the Flesh was condensed, and the Dao pattern was successfully inscribed.

The prototype of the avenues made Ye Tian's endless avenues wider and wider, although the length was still 1,000 meters, but the width was gradually approaching 2,000 meters.

Another hundred thousand years passed, and Ye Tian finally successfully condensed all the prototypes of the Great Dao corresponding to the Chaos Divine Power he had learned, and engraved the corresponding Dao patterns.

Today, Ye Tianxu Heavenly Dao body is fully engraved with 22 dao patterns.

If it weren't for the fact that there were some avenues of chaos supernatural powers, otherwise Ye Tian would definitely have more than 22 dao patterns now.

After so many thousands of years of penance, Ye Tian had almost given up the Xuanxuan Technique, but his strength improvement was not slow at all, and now he had reached the eight-star mid-stage god general, and he was also at the top level in the ranks of the eight-star mid-stage god generals.

On the list of god generals above the ancestral monument, Ye Tianwan's name as a god general has always been at the top of the list of god generals, and no one can threaten his position.

Cloud Purple Palace.

Yun Zi Divine Maiden sighed: "The Ten Thousand Laws Dao is too strong, he has already stepped into the eight-star mid-stage Divine General, and I still can't step into the Eight-Star Middle Divine General, how does he cultivate? Could it be that the inheritance of the Void Heaven One Pulse is too strong? Impossible, my master may not be as good as the one in the Void Heaven One Pulse, but it is not too weak, and the other Dao ancestors of the Void Heaven One Pulse are not very powerful, why is the Ten Thousand Laws Dao so special?"

The Yunzi Divine Maiden was puzzled, and only thought that Ye Tian was too demonic.

Void Heaven Temple.

Peng Yu Heavenly Monarch and several other Heavenly Monarchs were also discussing Ye Tian.

"Daozi's talent is too terrifying, in just a few hundred thousand years, he has been promoted to the middle stage of the eight-star god general, and the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden who is overpowering the God of War Tower, even among the countless Dao Ancestors in the entire chaos, is enough to rank in the forefront!"

The Black Armor Heavenly Monarch worshipped: "With the talent and progress speed of the Ten Thousand Law Daozi, he is even expected to be promoted to the Nine-Star Extreme God General in the future!"

"Nine Star Extreme, it's too difficult, isn't it?" Peng Yu Tianjun said uncertainly.

Most of the Dao Ancestors' personal traditions can indeed be promoted to Nine-Star Divine Generals, but they can't be promoted only to the Nine-Star Early Stage Divine Generals, and they have no choice but to be promoted to the Heavenly Mandate Realm.

Nine-star early god general, nine-star mid-stage god general, nine-star late god general, nine-star peak god general, nine-star extreme god general, this represents the five potentials of the god general.

Dao ancestors, descendants, heirs or other geniuses all want to step into the nine-star god generals, but the potential and inheritance are different, and the limits that can be reached in the end are different.

Geniuses who can really reach the ultimate nine-star god general are too rare, even in the chaos, they have not been born for many years, and several nine-star late-stage god generals are still impacting, unwilling to step into the realm of heavenly destiny.

The reason why these god generals all want to raise the level of the Nine Star God Generals to a higher level is because the stronger the level of the god generals, the greater the benefits they will get after breaking through to the Heavenly Mandate Realm, and even affect their lives.

For example, after the nine-star early god will become the realm of the Mandate of Heaven, he can get the baptism of the Chaos Origin, and the potential of the body and soul will be increased a lot, and it will be described as 100 points of Chaos Origin Baptism for the time being, but if the Nine-Star Extreme God will be promoted to the Mandate of Heaven, he may be able to obtain 1000 points of Chaos Origin Baptism, how high is the increase in the potential of the body and soul?

This kind of potential enhancement is unimaginable, even Dao Ancestor is difficult to improve the potential of a Heavenly Monarch!

Potential represents not only the speed of cultivation, but also the combat effectiveness and future achievements.

It's like Dao Ancestors, some Dao Ancestors are very weak, but some Dao Ancestors are very strong, which has something to do with the accumulation of the level of the gods.

In short, those true geniuses did not accumulate to the limit of the Divine Commander level, and they were not willing to advance to the Heavenly Mandate Realm at all.

"Hahaha, I'm just saying this, it's really difficult to become a nine-star ultimate god general, it seems that no one has stepped into the nine-star ultimate god general in our Void Heaven Pulse for a long time, I hope that the Ten Thousand Laws Dao can step in, then our Void Heaven Pulse will be famous again!"
